description: Stage 2 Enablement: Refactor orchestrator to support file persistence, target-aware worktrees, and LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation patterns.

implement_file_persistence.input: Modify orchestrator.py to include a 'FileWriter' utility. Ensure agent outputs (captured from subprocess.run) can be persisted directly to source-code files instead of only being aggregated in workflow_results JSON.

enable_target_worktree_awareness.input: Update the 'cwd' logic in _execute_gemini_task, _execute_mistral_vibe_task, and _execute_amazon_q_task to accept an optional 'target_dir' parameter, enabling agents to operate on the '../vector-infra-remediation' git worktree.

implement_judge_eval_pattern.input: Implement a foundational 'LLM-as-a-Judge' method in orchestrator.py. This method should use Mistral to evaluate the security and quality of code generated by Gemini before it is persisted to the file system, adhering to Intuit's guardrail standards.

add_token_efficiency_tracker.input: Design a basic token-tracking metadata layer for AgentResult to help avoid the '$50M/month mistake' by logging estimated token usage for each workflow execution.

update_platform_documentation.input: Update the root README.md to document the shift from a 'simulation POC' to an 'AI-Native Engineering Platform' capable of autonomous cross-branch remediation.
